_comment: Sign vectors for compareCellValues (local sort, in-memory display grids). expect = Math.sign of the comparison. Locale-safe strings only — collation order for these pairs is identical across ICU builds. Emptiness ranking is NOT the comparator's job (sortRowsLocally ranks empties last in both directions before comparing), so no ''/null vectors here.

comparator.note: mixed alphanumeric falls back to localeCompare ('10A' < '9' lexically)
number vs non-numeric string → localeCompare of stringified values
